title: Miracode for Caxton
description: The almighty Miracode font via Caxton
body:
# Miracode for Caxton

Simply a resource pack which adds the
[Miracode](https://github.com/IdreesInc/Miracode/) font, which I happen to use
on almost everything where I can change the font. And now that list includes
Minecraft.

The latest version is marked as 1.20.1, however I am pretty sure that it will
load on numerous other versions. However this is untested. Feel free to make an
issue [here](https://codeberg.org/emmathemartian/miracode-for-caxton) if you
want me to explicitly support another version (assuming Caxton exists on it).

## Credits

- IdreesInc for [Miracode](https://github.com/IdreesInc/Miracode/)
- flirora for [Caxton](https://modrinth.com/mod/caxton)!

## Dependencies

If it was not obvious, this mod requires Caxton to load.

## License

`assets/miracode/textures/font/miracode.ttf` is licensed under the Open Font
License, which can be found in the same folder (`license.txt`)

All of the other files in this resource pack are licensed under the Unlicense.
That means that you can do whatever you want with them. This resource pack took
me about five minutes to make and I really do not care what you do with the
files.
